lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Hello. What can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know, what can you do for me?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Well, that depends.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Depends on what?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: It depends on whether you like kebabs or not.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is that?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Seeing as I'm in the kebab construction industry, I mainly help people in need of a kebab.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well then, what kind of kebabs do you, er, construct?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: I offer two different types of kebabs: the standard run- of-the-mill kebab seen throughout Gielinor and enjoyed by many an intoxicated dwarf, and my speciality, the extra-hot kebab. So which shall it be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want a standard kebab, please.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: That will be three gold coins.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I'm good.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Come back soon, I could do with a few more customers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seem to be short on coins. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have one of those crazy hot kebabs of yours?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: One super kebab coming up! Be careful, they really are as hot as they're made out to be.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, sure.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I seem to be short on coins. Sorry.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you sell me that bottle of special kebab sauce?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Well, that depends. What do you intend to do with it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, I've no intention of setting up a rival kebab shop.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: But then what do you want it for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know, but I think I could have a little bit of fun with it.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: You're not going to put it in Drunken Ali's drink, are you? That's what happened the last time I gave someone the sauce.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, that would be a bit cliché. I think I'll come up with something more original.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, I might get back to you on the sauce. I'm a bit overburdened as it is.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Just be careful with it, it's potent enough to give a camel the runs.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is the difference between the standard and the extra-hot kebab?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: If I told you that I would have to kill you. Kebab construction is a cut-throat industry. The extra-hot kebab gives me my competitive edge and if I were to divulge my secrets to every passing adventurer, I'd

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: soon be out of business.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So there's no difference except the sauce you use?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Shh! Keep your voice down. You should have told me you were from the union.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Listen, I've got to run. I'll catch you later.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need some information.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: If information is what you need, there are many better people to ask than myself who could help you. One of the town's street urchins or perhaps the local drunk. I may be many things to many different people, but a

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: gossip I am not.

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Please give me your answer!

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Nope, not correct!

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Please give me your answer!

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Ali the Kebab seller
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
